title: Weekly Market Report | May 18–22, 2026
report:
## Japan Equity Markets — Weekly Overview

The Nikkei 225 moved **+1,285 pts (+3.3%)** this week (38,847 → 40,132).

The average return across all 67 themes was **+5.1%**.

---

## 📅 Key Events & News This Week

- Google I/O 2026: Willow 3.0 quantum chip announced → quantum stocks surge
- Bank of Japan reduces JGB purchases to Y1.5T/month (QT acceleration)
- Tokyo Electron: order backlog hits all-time record
- USD/JPY: ¥148 range

---
